name: Invoice
description: Stripe Invoice object representing a statement of amounts owed for subscription or one-time charges.

amount_remaining.description: Amount still remaining to be paid

subscription.description: ID of the subscription that generated this invoice

payment_intent.description: ID of the PaymentIntent for this invoice

due_date.description: Unix timestamp when payment is due

period_start.description: Start of the billing period (Unix timestamp)

period_end.description: End of the billing period (Unix timestamp)

lines.description: List of line items on the invoice

hosted_invoice_url.description: URL for the hosted invoice page

invoice_pdf.description: URL to download the invoice PDF

created.description: Unix timestamp when the invoice was created

livemode.description: Whether the invoice is in live mode
